docs: Account providing allowance.
args.label: owner

docs: Allowance beneficiary.
args.label: spender

docs: New allowance amount.
args.label: amount

docs: Event emitted when allowance by `owner` to `spender` changes.
events.label: Approval

docs: Transfer sender. `None` in case of minting new tokens.
args.label: from

docs: Transfer recipient. `None` in case of burning tokens.
args.label: to

docs: Amount of tokens transferred (or minted/burned).
args.label: value

docs: Event emitted when transfer of tokens occurs.
events.label: Transfer

docs: The account that was added as a burner.
args.label: burner

docs: The owner who added the burner.
args.label: added_by

docs: TOK-M04: Event emitted when an authorized burner is added.
events.label: BurnerAdded

docs: The account that was added as a minter.
args.label: minter

docs: The owner who added the minter.
args.label: added_by

docs: TOK-M04: Event emitted when an authorized minter is added.
events.label: MinterAdded

docs: The account that was removed as a burner.
args.label: burner

docs: The owner who removed the burner.
args.label: removed_by

docs: TOK-M04: Event emitted when an authorized burner is removed.
events.label: BurnerRemoved

docs: The account that was removed as a minter.
args.label: minter

docs: The owner who removed the minter.
args.label: removed_by

docs: TOK-M04: Event emitted when an authorized minter is removed.
events.label: MinterRemoved

docs: Previous owner of the contract.
args.label: old_owner

docs: New owner of the contract.
args.label: new_owner

docs: Event emitted when ownership is transferred.
TOK-L01: Added for ownership transfer transparency.
events.label: OwnershipTransferred

docs: Current owner proposing the transfer.
args.label: current_owner

docs: Proposed new owner.
args.label: proposed_owner

docs: TOK-M03: Event emitted when ownership transfer is proposed.
events.label: OwnershipTransferProposed

docs: Current owner who cancelled the transfer.
args.label: current_owner

docs: The proposed owner whose transfer was cancelled.
args.label: cancelled_proposed_owner

docs: TOK-M03: Event emitted when ownership transfer is cancelled.
events.label: OwnershipTransferCancelled

docs: Burn tokens from an account. Requires either:
- Caller is burning their own tokens (from == caller), OR
- Caller has sufficient allowance from the 'from' account
messages.label: burn_from
